title: Dressing Room Mirror Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Dressing Room Mirror Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 realistic dressing-room mirror fashion portrait for adult East Asian woman in an opaque taupe wrap cardigan and tailored cream trousers, clean natural fashion look, preserving a restrained private wardrobe snapshot mood without visible text. Subject: adult East Asian woman in an opaque taupe wrap cardigan and tailored cream trousers, clean natural fashion look appears as the adult fashion subject, photographed through a full-length mirror with a clean natural face reflection, tasteful body silhouette, and non-explicit editorial styling. Scene: private dressing room with full-length mirror, warm wardrobe lights, half-open closet, face visible in mirror, tasteful waist silhouette provides the private wardrobe environment with mirror depth, warm cabinet lighting, half-open closet structure, and quiet lived-in details. Composition: Fixed vertical mirror-photo composition: the subject stands near a full-length mirror, body and reflection both guide the eye, the face is visible mainly through the mirror, wardrobe panels create depth, and the frame stays clean, intimate, and centered for a 9:16 lifestyle portrait. Signature Elements: Full-length mirror, half-open closet, reflected face, warm white wardrobe lights, quiet private-room atmosphere, tasteful silhouette emphasis, and clean non-commercial lifestyle realism. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Warm white wardrobe light, soft taupe and cream neutrals, muted wood or fabric tones, gentle shadow gradients, and clean low-saturation fashion colors. Lighting: Warm cabinet glow mixed with soft ambient room light, subtle mirror highlights, gentle skin detail, and controlled shadows around the back, waist, and wardrobe edges. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Mirror glass, matte wardrobe panels, soft knit or tailored fabric, subtle jewelry, warm cabinet strips, and realistic cloth folds with tactile detail. Restrictions: Use an adult subject only. Keep styling non-explicit, tasteful, natural, and public-safe.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
